name: memorist_agent
tagline: Capture your parents' life stories through adaptive interviews — WhatsApp, WeChat, or direct conversation.
description:
Memorist Agent helps you record your parents' and grandparents' life stories before it's too late. It conducts warm, adaptive interviews across 9 life domains — childhood, family history, love, career, places, historical moments, and more. It remembers every name, place, and year mentioned and follows up with targeted questions to draw out richer memories.

Works in English and Chinese (普通话). Interviews can be conducted via WhatsApp, WeChat relay, or direct conversation. All story data is stored locally on your machine — nothing leaves without your permission.

After enough sessions, compile everything into polished memoir chapters that you can share with the whole family.
